title: Knysna welcomes first newborn of 2026
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Provincial Hospital welcomed the New Year on a joyful note with the birth of a healthy baby boy at 07:25 this morning, marking the hospital’s first delivery of the year.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Provincial Hospital welcomed the New Year on a joyful note with the birth of a healthy baby boy at 07:25 this morning, marking the hospital’s first delivery of the year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The baby’s mother, Ivy Muskanga, said her son is doing well and weighs 3,7kg. The family has not yet chosen a name, but both mother and baby are in good health."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There were no Christmas Day babies born at the hospital this year.","html":"There were no Christmas Day babies born at the hospital this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
